name: Glorbo Fruttodrillo
lore:
Lore of Glorbo Fruttodrillo
                                    


This character features a head and legs resembling those of a crocodile, perched atop a watermelon. Its primary habitat consists of swampy areas, and it boasts a weight of approximately 304 kilograms.
In contrast to other crocodiles, Bombardi Ro stands out as the top performer. This unique individual is essentially a crocodile shaped like a watermelon, which earns him a special place within the community.
Description original text
glorbo fruttodrillo nel profondo della Palude glorbo frutt Drillo regnava il suo corpo era un'enorme anguria a strisce
The fruit pits in the deep swamps were made of huge striped watermelons.
